Organic molecules

Hydrocarbon

Alkane

Wikipedia 

wireframe only; wireframe 0.2
rotate x 10

Wikipedia 

spin on

Wikipedia 

isosurface vdw

Wikipedia 

moveto 2.0 {1 1 1 90}

Wikipedia

Alkene

select atomno=1,2
color atoms yellow

Wikipedia 

bondOrder double

Wikipedia 

color bonds red

Wikipedia 

for (var i=0; i<10; i++) {
rotate y 30
color atoms random
delay 0.5
}

Wikipedia 

color bonds blue

Wikipedia

Links:
  1. Alkanes and alkenes

Alkyne

color bonds yellow

Wikipedia 

select bond(triple);C2, C3

Wikipedia 

load "SMILES:CCCC#C"

Wikipedia

Arene

Alcohol

cylinder 50

Wikipedia 

spacefill 20

Wikipedia

Phenol

select aromatic
color blue

Wikipedia 

select aromatic
wireframe 100

Wikipedia

Ether

select O C
wireframe 100

Wikipedia

Aldehyde

select C=O
wireframe 100

Wikipedia 

wireframe 50

Wikipedia

Ketone

isosurface solvent; color isosurface red blue

Wikipedia 

select carbonyl
color yellow

Wikipedia

Carboxylic acid

dihedral

Wikipedia 

show atoms
show bonds

Wikipedia
